sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: ING Ends Russian Unit Sale Amid Doubts On Buyer Approval
feed.summary: Dutch bank ING Groep NV has announced it will not proceed with the sale of its Russian subsidiary, ING Bank (Eurasia) JSC, to Global Development JSC. The decision was made due to an expectation that the Moscow-based buyer would not secure the necessary regulatory approvals for the acquisition. This marks the end of ING's efforts to divest its Russian unit.

feed.title: Cessna SkyCourier Strengthens Mission Versatility With New In‑Flight Operable Door Option
feed.summary: Textron Aviation Inc. announced a new In-Flight Operable Door option for the passenger variant of its Cessna SkyCourier turboprop, enhancing its versatility for special missions. This modification, expected in 2028, will allow for airborne deployment of personnel and cargo, expanding the aircraft's use in military, humanitarian, and commercial operations like skydiving and disaster relief. The door integrates with the SkyCourier's robust platform, known for performance and lower operating costs, and will maintain standard ground operations.

feed.title: Insulet Corporation stock hits 52-week low at 199.53 USD
feed.summary: Insulet Corporation's stock has hit a new 52-week low of $199.53, despite the company's strong fundamentals including a $14.3 billion market cap and 31% revenue growth. InvestingPro data suggests the stock is oversold and undervalued, with analysts revising earnings upwards. The decline comes amidst growing competition, recent price target cuts by analysts, a voluntary product recall, and a new executive appointment.

feed.title: Infosys, Harness partner to drive AI-led software delivery transformation
feed.summary: Infosys has announced a strategic collaboration with Harness, an AI software delivery platform, to accelerate AI-led software delivery transformation for enterprises globally. The partnership aims to integrate Infosys’ Topaz Fabric and Cobalt cloud capabilities with the Harness Software Delivery Platform to improve productivity, streamline processes, and reduce time-to-market. This collaboration addresses inefficiencies in software engineering by automating workflows from code to production with AI interventions, ensuring faster, more reliable, and governed delivery systems.

feed.title: Barclays Maintains PPL Corp(PPL.US) With Buy Rating, Raises Target Price to $41
feed.summary: Barclays analyst Michael Lonegan has reiterated a "Buy" rating for PPL Corp (PPL.US) and increased the target price from $40 to $41. According to TipRanks data, the analyst has a 67.9% success rate and an 8.4% average return over the past year. This information is intended for informational purposes only and not as investment advice.

feed.title: Competition Bureau reaches agreement with Welltower to protect competition in retirement home industry
feed.summary: The Competition Bureau has reached a consent agreement with Welltower OP LLC to address competition concerns regarding its proposed acquisition of 34 retirement home properties from Amica Senior Lifestyles in Canada. To resolve these concerns, Welltower has agreed to sell four of its existing retirement homes to independent purchasers. This agreement follows scrutiny of Welltower’s recent dominance in the UK care home market by the Competition and Markets Authority (CMA), which is investigating multiple acquisitions by Welltower Inc.

feed.title: Scotiabank Adjusts Price Target on Digital Realty Trust to $195 From $189, Maintains Sector Outperform Rating
feed.summary: Scotiabank has increased its price target for Digital Realty Trust (DLR) to $195 from $189, while reiterating its Sector Outperform rating. This adjustment reflects an updated outlook from the financial institution regarding the data center real estate investment trust. The article also briefly mentions other analyst adjustments for Digital Realty Trust from Wolfe, Barclays, and Raymond James, along with recent company activities such as acquisitions and executive changes.

feed.title: 11 million meals and 670,000 shelter nights: Northern Trust's 2025 impact
feed.summary: Northern Trust announced its 2025 philanthropic impact, detailing $16 million in charitable giving and 121,000 employee volunteer hours globally. The efforts focused on food security, affordable housing, quality education, and accessible healthcare, resulting in over 11 million meals provided and nearly 670,000 nights of safe shelter funded. The company emphasized its long-standing partnerships and employee engagement as key to creating lasting social impact.

feed.title: T. ROWE PRICE COLLEGE SAVINGS PLAN BECOMES "T. ROWE PRICE 529" TO REFLECT EXPANDED FLEXIBILITY FOR EDUCATION EXPENSES
feed.summary: T. Rowe Price has renamed its "T. Rowe Price College Savings Plan" to "T. Rowe Price 529" to better reflect the broadened scope of educational expenses that tax-advantaged 529 accounts can now cover, including apprenticeships and student loan repayments. This change coincides with the plan's 25th anniversary, which T. Rowe Price and the Education Trust of Alaska are celebrating with a $250 matching incentive for new savers. The firm emphasizes the importance of early savings and the expanded flexibility of 529 plans in helping families prepare for future education costs.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Adjusts Price Target on Hartford Insurance Group to $153 From $151, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has raised its price target for Hartford Insurance Group (HIG) to $153 from $151, while reiterating a Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects the firm's continued positive outlook on the insurance company. The news follows other recent analyst adjustments for Hartford Insurance Group, with varied price targets and ratings.

feed.title: TCW Exited Seagate Technology Holdings PL (STX) in Q4
feed.summary: TCW Relative Value Mid Cap Fund exited its position in Seagate Technology Holdings plc (STX) during the fourth quarter of 2025. Despite Seagate's strong performance, with its shares gaining significantly over the past year and robust demand driven by AI, TCW believes other AI stocks offer greater upside potential with less downside risk. The fund also noted that equities ended 2025 positively, with the S&P 500 up 17.9%.

feed.title: Blackstone and TPG Complete Acquisition of Hologic
feed.summary: Blackstone and TPG have finalized their acquisition of Hologic, a global leader in women’s health, for up to $79 per share, taking the company private. Joe Almeida has been appointed as the new Chief Executive Officer, effective immediately. The transaction, which includes significant minority investments from ADIA and GIC, aims to accelerate Hologic's innovation and growth in medical technologies.

feed.title: Barclays Adjusts Price Target on CMS Energy to $81 From $79, Maintains Overweight Rating
feed.summary: Barclays has increased its price target for CMS Energy (CMS) to $81 from $79, reiterating an Overweight rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects continued positive analyst sentiment towards the utility company. The article also notes other recent analyst price target changes for CMS Energy from firms like Morgan Stanley, JPMorgan, KeyBanc, Jefferies, UBS, Mizuho, and BMO Capital.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Adjusts Price Target on Brown & Brown to $73 From $82, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has lowered its price target for Brown & Brown (BRO) shares from $82 to $73, while reiterating a Neutral rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a revised outlook from the investment bank for the multiline insurance and brokers company. The news follows similar price target adjustments from other analysts, including Barclays, Morgan Stanley, and Jefferies, all taking place in recent weeks.

feed.title: BNP Paribas Exane Adjusts L3Harris Technologies PT to $390 From $380, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: BNP Paribas Exane has raised its price target for L3Harris Technologies (LHX) to $390 from $380, while maintaining a Neutral rating on the stock. L3Harris Technologies specializes in designing, manufacturing, and marketing information and communication equipment for defense, government, and commercial sectors. The company's net sales are primarily derived from integrated mission systems, space and airborne systems, communication systems, and propulsion/power generation defense systems.

feed.title: Citigroup Adjusts Norfolk Southern PT to $313 From $300, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: Citigroup has increased its price target for Norfolk Southern (NSC) to $313, up from $300, while maintaining a "Neutral" rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst other analyst revisions for Norfolk Southern, highlighting ongoing recalibrations of expectations for the railroad company. The article also provides a brief company profile and recent news updates related to Norfolk Southern.

feed.title: Corteva Inc stock: Legal win and split plan spark investor interest
feed.summary: Corteva Inc has secured a significant legal victory with the dismissal of price-fixing claims, removing a major uncertainty as it prepares to split into separate seed and crop protection units by late 2026. This strategic move, coupled with analyst optimism and strong operational EBITDA forecasts, positions Corteva as a compelling investment in the agricultural sector for those seeking exposure to innovation and global food demand. Investors should monitor upcoming shareholder meetings and earnings reports for crucial updates on the split and its implications.

feed.title: Wolfe Research Adjusts Old Dominion Freight Line PT to $185 From $183, Maintains Underperform Rating
feed.summary: Wolfe Research has adjusted its price target for Old Dominion Freight Line (ODFL) to $185, up from $183, while reiterating an "Underperform" rating. This update reflects the analyst firm's latest assessment of the company's valuation and outlook. Other firms like Citigroup and JPMorgan also recently updated their price targets for ODFL.

feed.title: Bank of America Named No. 1 Nonprofit OCIO Provider Globally in 2025
feed.summary: Bank of America has been recognized as the No. 1 outsourced chief investment office (OCIO) provider to nonprofit organizations globally in 2025 by the Chestnut Solutions Institute, managing $79.2 billion in nonprofit assets. This achievement highlights its role as a strategic partner, offering an OCIO 2.0 platform that provides enhanced transparency and guidance. The company's leadership is reinforced by its legacy trust platform and dedicated team, contributing to the growing global OCIO marketplace, which is projected to reach nearly $5.8 trillion by 2030.

feed.title: Haymaker Acquisition Corp. 4 (NYSE: HYAC) secures non-redemption and forward share support
feed.summary: Haymaker Acquisition Corp. 4 has secured a significant non-redemption agreement from an existing shareholder, who reversed plans to redeem 250,000 Class A shares and committed to vote in favor of the business combination with Suncrete. Additionally, Haymaker and PubCo entered a Forward Purchase Agreement with Harraden Circle funds for up to 5,000,000 shares, funded from the SPAC trust. These arrangements aim to stabilize cash and voting support for the proposed merger, which received overwhelming approval from both shareholders and warrantholders at recent meetings.

feed.title: RBC Adjusts Price Target on Moderna to $35 From $30, Maintains Sector Perform Rating
feed.summary: RBC Capital Markets has raised its price target for Moderna (MRNA) to $35 from $30, while reiterating a "Sector Perform" rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a revised outlook from the analyst firm. The article also notes other recent analyst rating changes for Moderna from Barclays, Deutsche Bank, and Berenberg.

feed.title: [8-K] TransDigm Group INC Reports Material Event
feed.summary: TransDigm Group Incorporated has completed its acquisition of Jet Parts Engineering and Victor Sierra Aviation Holdings for approximately $2.2 billion in cash. This acquisition, funded by cash on hand and debt offerings, expands TransDigm's presence in the highly engineered commercial aerospace aftermarket components sector. The acquired companies generated approximately $280 million in revenue for the year ended December 31, 2025, specializing in proprietary OEM-alternative aerospace parts and aftermarket solutions.

feed.title: Citigroup Adjusts Old Dominion Freight Line PT to $218 From $216, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: Citigroup has adjusted its price target for Old Dominion Freight Line (ODFL) to $218, up from $216, while reiterating a Neutral rating on the stock. This update reflects a minor revision in the bank's valuation for the freight transportation company. The article also provides a company profile, recent analyst recommendations from other firms, and various financial metrics and ratings for ODFL.

feed.title: Wolfe Research Adjusts Price Target on J.B. Hunt Transport Services to $244 From $221, Maintains Outperform Rating
feed.summary: Wolfe Research has increased its price target for J.B. Hunt Transport Services (NASDAQ: JBHT) to $244 from $221, while reiterating an Outperform rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a positive outlook from the research firm on the transportation company's future performance. The news was published on April 7, 2026, at 09:18 am EDT.

feed.title: Deere (DE) Pays $99M to Settle Right-to-Repair Fight With Farmers
feed.summary: Deere & Co (DE) has agreed to a $99 million settlement in a class action lawsuit concerning its right-to-repair practices, which will establish a fund for affected farmers and provide 10 years of access to repair tools. The agreement, which still requires judicial approval, addresses claims that Deere limited equipment repair to authorized dealers, driving up costs. Despite the settlement, a separate lawsuit brought by the U.S. Federal Trade Commission against Deere remains active.

feed.title: InterDigital CTO Pankaj sells $469k in shares
feed.summary: InterDigital's Chief Technology Officer, Rajesh Pankaj, sold 1,500 shares of IDCC stock for approximately $469,950 on April 6, 2026. This transaction was executed under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. Despite a significant 62% stock gain over the past year, InvestingPro analysis suggests the company might be overvalued relative to its Fair Value.

feed.title: Blackstone, TPG take Hologic (NASDAQ: HOLX) private in $17.3B deal
feed.summary: Hologic, Inc. has been acquired by funds managed by Blackstone and TPG in a cash deal valued at approximately $17.3 billion, effectively taking the company private. Shareholders received $76.00 per share in cash plus one contingent value right (CVR) that could pay up to an additional $3.00 per share based on future Breast Health revenue milestones. In conjunction with this acquisition, José (Joe) E. Almeida has been appointed as the new Chief Executive Officer, succeeding Stephen MacMillan, and Hologic's common stock will be delisted from Nasdaq.

feed.title: TransDigm Completes Acquisition of Jet Parts Engineering and Victor Sierra Aviation Holdings
feed.summary: TransDigm Group Incorporated has successfully completed its acquisition of Jet Parts Engineering and Victor Sierra Aviation Holdings for approximately $2.2 billion in cash. These companies, previously owned by Vance Street Capital, specialize in aerospace aftermarket solutions, including proprietary OEM-alternative parts and repairs for commercial, regional, and business aviation sectors. The acquisition was financed through cash on hand and debt offerings, bolstering TransDigm's position as a leading global supplier of highly engineered aircraft components.

feed.title: 35 government agencies win Tyler awards at Las Vegas tech conference
feed.summary: Tyler Technologies announced its 2026 Public Sector Excellence Award winners, recognizing 35 government agencies and honorable mentions for their innovation in deploying Tyler solutions. The awards were presented at the Tyler Connect user conference in Las Vegas, highlighting how these organizations use technology to improve efficiency and public service. The winning jurisdictions were honored across categories such as Civic Interaction & Public Trust, Data & Transparency, Digital Services & Cloud, Operational Efficiency, Performance & Innovation, and Public Safety.

feed.title: Should You Buy, Sell or Hold FCX Stock After a 20% YTD Rally?
feed.summary: Freeport-McMoRan Inc. (FCX) shares have seen a 20.2% year-to-date rally, driven by strong quarterly earnings and rising copper prices, despite underperforming its industry peers in some respects. The company benefits from substantial investments in capacity expansion, a robust balance sheet, and favorable copper market trends. However, rising unit costs and expected lower sales volumes due to production disruptions in Indonesia pose challenges, leading to a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold) recommendation.

feed.title: McDonald's Customers Say 'Every Time, There's A New Fee' As Online Orders Come With Layers Of Extra Charg
feed.summary: McDonald's customers are expressing widespread frustration over the multitude of fees added to online orders, including delivery, service, taxes, tip, and a "small order fee," which can significantly inflate the final price. A Reddit post highlighting a $3.50 small order fee causing a $20+ total for a modest order sparked the online discussion. While McDonald's acknowledges the "small order fee" in its FAQ since 2022, many customers perceive it as illogical and are re-evaluating the true cost of convenience through delivery apps, especially since third-party services like DoorDash often handle the deliveries and associated charges.

feed.title: When the Goal Is Destruction: What the Stryker Cyber Attack Means
feed.summary: The article details the cyberattack on Stryker Corporation by the Iranian-linked hacking group Handala, which used a "wiper" attack to destroy data across 200,000 devices globally, halting manufacturing and disrupting medical services. This incident highlights the growing threat of state-sponsored cyberattacks, particularly for manufacturers in critical sectors, emphasizing that their goal is destruction rather than financial gain. The authors advise manufacturers to reassess backup strategies, build system redundancies, harden device management infrastructure, perform risk assessments, and cultivate a strong cybersecurity culture to mitigate such devastating attacks.

feed.title: Deere & Company Reaches Settlement in Repair Services Antitrust Litigation
feed.summary: Deere & Company has reached a settlement agreement in the multidistrict "right to repair" litigation, resolving a 2022 complaint without any finding of wrongdoing. As part of the settlement, Deere will deposit funds into a class settlement fund and continue to provide customers and service providers with access to repair resources, including tools, manuals, and diagnostic software. This agreement reaffirms the company's commitment to customer choice and access to equipment support.

feed.title: Phillips 66 Sees Losses Of $900M In Q1 Amid Tension In Gulf
feed.summary: Phillips 66 has disclosed an estimated $900 million in pre-tax mark-to-market losses for the first quarter of 2026, primarily due to derivative positions and segment-specific challenges in refining, midstream, chemicals, and marketing. The company addressed a related $3 billion cash collateral outflow by drawing a new $2.25 billion term loan and expanding its accounts receivable securitization program. Despite these challenges, Phillips 66 maintains $6 billion in liquidity and aims to reduce its total debt to $17 billion by the end of 2027.

feed.title: Gilead to Buy German Biotech Tubulis for Up to $5 Billion
feed.summary: Gilead Sciences has announced its agreement to acquire German biotech company Tubulis GmbH in a cash deal valued at up to $5 billion. This acquisition aims to bolster Gilead's cancer drug pipeline, specifically by investing in antibody-drug conjugates, a targeted form of cancer treatment.

feed.title: TransDigm's $2.2B buy adds two aircraft-parts suppliers with 700 staff
feed.summary: TransDigm Group Incorporated (NYSE: TDG) has finalized its acquisition of Jet Parts Engineering and Victor Sierra Aviation Holdings for approximately $2.2 billion in cash. This strategic move, funded by cash on hand and debt offerings, adds two aftermarket aerospace solutions providers with a combined revenue of $280 million for 2025 and approximately 700 employees, expanding TransDigm's portfolio of proprietary PMA aftermarket brands. The acquisition reinforces TransDigm's focus on highly engineered aircraft components for commercial and military aircraft.

feed.title: Delta Air Lines raises bag fees, following competitors
feed.summary: Delta Air Lines has announced a hike in its checked bag fees, increasing the cost for the first bag by $10 to $45, effective for tickets booked from April 8 onwards. This move follows similar price adjustments by competitors like JetBlue and United Airlines, and is attributed to rising jet fuel costs and global economic conditions. Medallion elite status holders and eligible SkyMiles/American Express credit card users will retain their free baggage benefits, while fees for second and third checked bags have also increased significantly.

feed.title: $45 a month now buys home internet and unlimited wireless
feed.summary: Mint Mobile has launched a new "Unf*! Your Bills" bundle offering 5G Home MINTernet and unlimited premium wireless for $45 per month. The company, an affiliate of T-Mobile US, aims to disrupt traditional cable internet pricing with transparent, affordable plans that include a "5-Year No Bill Creep Guarantee." This initiative is designed to provide a simpler and more cost-effective alternative to confusing internet and wireless bills, as highlighted in a promotional campaign featuring Marie Kondo and Ryan Reynolds.

feed.title: Kelly Hotel & Lodging Sector ETF (HOTL) stock price, news, quote and history
feed.summary: This page provides detailed financial information for the Kelly Hotel & Lodging Sector ETF (HOTL), including its current stock price, historical data, performance overview, and key metrics. It highlights the ETF's investment strategy, focusing on companies in the hotel and lodging business, and lists its sector weightings and related tickers. The fund aims to track the total return performance of an index of hotel and lodging companies using a passive management approach.

feed.title: Total non-current liabilities of Gates Industrial Corporation plc – NYSE:GTES
feed.summary: This page provides financial data for Gates Industrial Corporation plc (NYSE:GTES), specifically focusing on its total non-current liabilities. It also lists various financial tools and resources available through TradingView. The article serves as a direct access point to GTES's financial performance metrics.

feed.title: Delta Air hikes checked baggage fees as jet fuel prices soar
feed.summary: Delta Air Lines is increasing checked baggage fees for domestic and select short-haul international routes, following similar moves by United and JetBlue. This decision comes as airlines face significantly higher jet fuel costs due to escalating tensions in the Middle East. The fees for the first and second checked bags will rise by $10 each, while the third checked bag will increase by $50, making the new costs $45, $55, and $200 respectively.

feed.title: Insulet (NASDAQ:PODD) Cut to Neutral at Citigroup
feed.summary: Citigroup downgraded Insulet (NASDAQ:PODD) from a "buy" to a "neutral" rating and reduced its price target to $230 from $338, indicating a potential 13% upside. This adjustment comes despite Insulet beating Q1 earnings estimates with $1.55 EPS and $783.8 million in revenue, a 31.2% year-over-year increase. The consensus among analysts remains a "Moderate Buy" with an average target of $349.10.

feed.title: Wells Fargo & Company Begins Coverage on Pinterest (NYSE:PINS)
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company has initiated coverage on Pinterest (NYSE:PINS) with an "overweight" rating and a $25.00 price target, suggesting a potential upside of 36.8% from its previous close. This new rating comes as Pinterest is trading near $18.27 and recently reported a slight miss on EPS and revenue, though it still showed 14.3% year-over-year revenue growth. The overall analyst consensus for Pinterest remains a "Hold" with an average target price of $25.42.

feed.title: Arm Holdings slides as Morgan Stanley downgrades (ARM:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: Arm Holdings shares experienced a 3.7% drop in premarket trading following a downgrade from Morgan Stanley. The firm lowered its rating on Arm to Equal-Weight from Overweight, citing Arm's transition into chip making as a structural evolution of its business model. This change in business model is seen as a key factor in the re-evaluation of the company's stock outlook.

feed.title: UBS Group Cuts Monster Beverage (NASDAQ:MNST) Price Target to $80.00
feed.summary: UBS Group has lowered its price target for Monster Beverage (NASDAQ:MNST) from $92.00 to $80.00, maintaining a "neutral" rating on the stock. Despite this, the consensus analyst rating for Monster Beverage remains a "Moderate Buy" with an average target of $83.19. The company recently surpassed earnings expectations with an EPS of $0.51 and revenue of $2.10 billion, showing a 17.6% year-over-year revenue increase.

feed.title: Tractor Supply Company (TSCO) PT Lowered to $55 at Evercore ISI
feed.summary: Evercore ISI analyst Oliver Wintermantel has lowered the price target for Tractor Supply Company (TSCO) to $55. This detail is part of a premium article, requiring a StreetInsider.com Premium subscription to access the full content.

feed.title: Oceania Cruises® Announces the Reinspiration of Oceania Marina™
feed.summary: Oceania Cruises has announced a comprehensive reinspiration of its ship, Oceania Marina, scheduled for dry dock in October 2026. This stem-to-stern transformation is part of the Oceania NEXT program, aiming to redesign staterooms, enhance public spaces, and align the ship's aesthetic with the brand's modern luxury vision and upcoming newbuilds. Key highlights include redesigned staterooms with new bathrooms, refreshed suites and public areas, the introduction of a Founders Bar, a new Chef's Studio, the addition of The Bakery to Baristas, and enhanced specialty restaurants.

feed.title: Allergan Aesthetics Third State-of-the-Art AMI Center Opens in Austin
feed.summary: Allergan Aesthetics, an AbbVie company, announced the opening of its third U.S. AMI Training Center in Austin, Texas, expanding its national training network for healthcare professionals. This new state-of-the-art facility provides comprehensive, hands-on education focusing on advanced injection techniques, complication management, and practice development across Allergan Aesthetics' portfolio. The center aims to elevate aesthetics education standards, improve patient care, and support practitioners' professional growth through an immersive learning experience.

feed.title: Bank of America Named No. 1 Nonprofit OCIO Provider Globally in 2025
feed.summary: Bank of America has been recognized as the leading nonprofit outsourced chief investment officer (OCIO) provider globally for 2025. This prestigious ranking highlights the bank's strong commitment to serving the financial needs of nonprofit organizations worldwide.

feed.title: Alloy Therapeutics Enters into Multi-Target Collaboration and License Agreement with Biogen for Use
feed.summary: Alloy Therapeutics has announced a multi-target collaboration and license agreement with Biogen for the use of Alloy’s AntiClastic™ ASO Platform. This partnership aims to accelerate the development of innovative oligonucleotide therapeutics, building on a previous collaboration between the two companies. Alloy will receive an upfront payment and is eligible for additional milestone payments and royalties on any resulting products.
